description: Start date of the maternal residency episode that the surviving row represents.
End date of the maternal residency episode that the surviving row represents.
Event type at residency start (1=birth, 2=enter, 3=enumeration; NHRC codebook).
Event type at residency end (1=death, 2=exited, 3=present; NHRC codebook).
Date of death; NA if alive at last record.
Integer days from child_dob to child_dod; NA if alive.
1 if death on day of birth.
1 if death within 0–7 days of birth (early neonatal).
Stream A primary outcome: 1 if stillbirth OR died_enn.
Birth weight in kg; 0, 9.9, and outliers set to NA.
1 if birth weight < 2.5 kg; NA if weight missing.
1 if birth weight < 1.5 kg; NA if weight missing.
Place of birth (1=hospital, 2=health centre, 3=home, 4=tba home, 5=other; NHRC codebook).
Mode of delivery (1=normal vaginal, 2=cesarean, 3=vacuum, 4=forceps, 5=vaginal cutting, 7=other; NHRC codebook).
Material used to cut umbilical cord (1=new razor, 2=old razor, 3=knife, 4=sharp stone, 5=scissors, 6=other; NHRC codebook).
Material used to dress umbilical stump (1=shea butter, 2=black powder + shea, 3=western medicine, 4=nothing, 5=other; NHRC codebook).
Pregnancy month at first ANC visit; reliable only 2013+.
Number of ANC visits during pregnancy; reliable only 2013+.
1 if first live birth of mother; 2 otherwise.
Parity categories from ceb; NA where ceb missing.
Raw integer outcome code (1=abortion, 2=miscarriage, 3=live birth, 4=stillbirth, 5=neonatal death, 6=censored preg, 7=still preg; 8/9 recoded NA per NHRC codebook).
Labelled child_birth_type (abortion / miscarriage / live_birth / stillbirth / neonatal_death_at_record / censored_pregnancy / ongoing_pregnancy).
